description_long: This is a large, modular wooden furniture unit composed of three tall shelving cabinets and an L-shaped desk with integrated shelving and storage. The shelving units feature multiple open shelves for storing books or display items, with one unit including a hinged door at the bottom for enclosed storage. The L-shaped desk section includes a main work surface, a raised shelf for additional storage, and a lower compartment for organization. The entire structure is finished in a warm, medium-brown wood veneer, giving it a cohesive and polished appearance. The design is practical for use in libraries, offices, or reception areas, providing both open and closed storage options. The visible hardware and hinges suggest some interactive elements such as doors and possibly drawers.
description: A large, modular wooden shelving and desk unit with open shelves, a hinged door, and integrated storage, finished in medium-brown wood veneer.
description_view_0: Front view showing three tall shelving units, one with a hinged door, and an L-shaped desk with integrated shelving.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and shelving units, with the L-shaped desk's structure clearly visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the layout of the shelving units and the L-shaped configuration of the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back and side panels of the desk and shelving units, with less detail of the shelves themselves.
